prs.title: Added My Orders section with event tickets display
prs.body: Added My Orders section with event tickets display

prs.title: Added ticket pricing feature in host event
prs.body: Implemented ticket pricing functionality in the Host Event feature. Users can now set events as paid and specify ticket prices. Updated form validation and ensured proper data handling for pricing related fields.

prs.title: Added hosting own event functionality
prs.body:
Added "Host Your Own Event" functionality
This feature allows users to create and manage their own events within the platform.

prs.title: Added new word
prs.body: Added new word 'sonder' to vocabulary list

prs.title: Sieve of Eratosthenes in Python
prs.body: Added a Python implementation of the Sieve of Eratosthenes to find all prime numbers up to a given number.

prs.title: Add Sieve of Eratosthenes implementation in Python
prs.body: Added a Python implementation of the Sieve of Eratosthenes to find all prime numbers up to a given number.

prs.title: Add matrix rotation algorithm
prs.body:
This PR adds a Python implementation of the Matrix Rotation algorithm. 

-> Rotates a square matrix 90° clockwise in-place.
-> Works for any n x n matrix.
-> Simple, readable, and efficient solution using transpose + row reversal.
-> Example usage is provided in comments for reference.

This addition complements the existing algorithms in the Python folder of Algo-a-Thon.

prs.title: My feature branch
prs.body:
This PR adds my personal contribution to the Dev-a-Thon repository:

- Created `Nishtha.py` in the contributions folder, a fun program explaining why I became a developer, with random adventures and terminal animations.
- Updated `README.md` to include my name and GitHub profile under the Contributors section.

prs.title: Add Knife pattern inside Patterns folder (Java, C++, Python)
prs.body:
### What this PR does
- Adds the Knife pattern inside the `Patterns` folder.
- Implemented in Java, C++, and Python.
- Includes a README.md explaining the pattern and how to run it.

### Folder structure
Patterns/
└── Knife/
    ├── Knife.java
    ├── knife.c++
    ├── knife.py
    └── README.md

issues.title: Add pagination for icons display
issues.body:
Currently, all icons are appearing at once on the page. This can cause performance issues and make the UI cluttered. I can implement pagination so that the icons load in batches.
Kindly assign this issue to me.

issues.title: Styling Issue: Header Not Properly Structured, Footer Misaligned
issues.body:
Hey @s-bose , great work on the overall structure! 👏
However, I noticed a few areas in the header and footer styling that could be refined for a cleaner and more consistent look.

Header Issues:

The layout looks a bit cluttered; spacing between elements can be improved.

The section headings aren’t bold or highlighted enough, so they don’t stand out as actual headings.

The overall sequence of elements feels slightly misaligned and could use better hierarchy.

Footer Issues:

The footer isn’t properly aligned it looks off balance, not centered or stretched properly.

The design doesn’t blend well with the rest of the page’s style or symmetry.

Suggestions:

Adjust spacing and alignment in the header.

Use font-weight or color contrast to make headings more prominent.

Reposition or redesign the footer to make it look more intentional and clean.

Maintain consistent styling with the rest of the layout theme.

@s-bose , could you please assign this issue to me?
I’d like to work on improving the header and footer styling. 😊
